description_long: This is a square, plush pillow with a soft, fabric exterior and a slightly puffy appearance, suggesting it is filled with a lightweight material such as polyester fiber or down. The front face of the pillow features a raised or embossed 'Ai' text design, which stands out against the otherwise smooth surface. The edges are gently rounded, and the seams are subtly visible, indicating careful stitching. The pillow is predominantly white, with some faint shading and texture variations that give it a slightly velvety look. There are no visible tags, labels, or brand logos on any side. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no visible stains or dirt.
description: A white, square pillow with a soft, fabric surface and an embossed 'Ai' text design on the front. The pillow appears plush, clean, and well-stitched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Ai' text design prominently embossed on the pillow's surface.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the pillow's thickness and the seam running along the edge, with no visible design elements.
description_view_2: Back view, similar in shape and texture to the front but without the 'Ai' text design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the pillow's thickness and seam, with faint texture but no design.
